languages.original_text: "A rudimentary space-time stasis. It eliminates the possibility of a pointless confrontation, which would be a waste of my time. Now — focus on my question."

languages.text: "Элементарный пространственно-временной стазис, исключающий бесполезную конфронтацию, на которую я не собираюсь тратить время. Теперь — сосредоточься на моем вопросе".

traits.locale_text: "Элементарный пространственно-временной стазис, исключающий бесполезную конфронтацию, на которую я не собираюсь тратить время. Теперь — сосредоточься на моем вопросе".

languages.text: "A rudimentary space-time stasis. It eliminates the possibility of a pointless confrontation, which would be a waste of my time. Now — focus on my question."
languages.original_text: "Элементарный пространственно-временной стазис, исключающий бесполезную конфронтацию, на которую я не собираюсь тратить время. Теперь — сосредоточься на моем вопросе".

traits.locale_text: "A rudimentary space-time stasis. It eliminates the possibility of a pointless confrontation, which would be a waste of my time. Now — focus on my question."
"A rudimentary space-time stasis. It eliminates the possibility of a pointless confrontation, which would be a waste of my time. Now — focus on my question."
"A rudimentary space-time stasis. It eliminates the possibility of a pointless confrontation, which would be a waste of my time. Now — focus on my question."

languages.text: «Una suspensión espaciotemporal rudimentaria. Elimina la posibilidad de un enfrentamiento inútil que me haría perder tiempo. Céntrate en mi pregunta».
languages.original_text: "A rudimentary space-time stasis. It eliminates the possibility of a pointless confrontation, which would be a waste of my time. Now — focus on my question."

traits.locale_text: «Una suspensión espaciotemporal rudimentaria. Elimina la posibilidad de un enfrentamiento inútil que me haría perder tiempo. Céntrate en mi pregunta».

languages.text: “不过是低级的时空停滞罢了。省却一场毫无意义的冲突，以免浪费我的时间。现在——专心回答我的问题。”
languages.original_text: "A rudimentary space-time stasis. It eliminates the possibility of a pointless confrontation, which would be a waste of my time. Now — focus on my question."

traits.locale_text: “不过是低级的时空停滞罢了。省却一场毫无意义的冲突，以免浪费我的时间。现在——专心回答我的问题。”

languages.text: « Une stase spatiotemporelle rudimentaire. J'élimine ainsi la possibilité d'une confrontation inutile, qui représenterait pour moi une perte de temps. Bien. Maintenant, concentrez-vous sur ma question. »
languages.original_text: "A rudimentary space-time stasis. It eliminates the possibility of a pointless confrontation, which would be a waste of my time. Now — focus on my question."

traits.locale_text: « Une stase spatiotemporelle rudimentaire. J'élimine ainsi la possibilité d'une confrontation inutile, qui représenterait pour moi une perte de temps. Bien. Maintenant, concentrez-vous sur ma question. »

languages.text: "İlkel bir uzay-zaman duraklaması. Vaktimi boşa harcayacak anlamsız bir çatışma ihtimalini ortadan kaldırıyor. Sen soruma odaklan."
languages.original_text: "A rudimentary space-time stasis. It eliminates the possibility of a pointless confrontation, which would be a waste of my time. Now — focus on my question."

traits.locale_text: "İlkel bir uzay-zaman duraklaması. Vaktimi boşa harcayacak anlamsız bir çatışma ihtimalini ortadan kaldırıyor. Sen soruma odaklan."

languages.text: "Eine rudimentäre Raum-Zeit-Stase. Sie eliminiert die Möglichkeit einer sinnlosen Konfrontation, die eine Vergeudung meiner Zeit wäre. Und jetzt ... konzentriere dich auf meine Frage."
languages.original_text: "A rudimentary space-time stasis. It eliminates the possibility of a pointless confrontation, which would be a waste of my time. Now — focus on my question."

traits.locale_text: "Eine rudimentäre Raum-Zeit-Stase. Sie eliminiert die Möglichkeit einer sinnlosen Konfrontation, die eine Vergeudung meiner Zeit wäre. Und jetzt ... konzentriere dich auf meine Frage."

languages.text: 「初歩的な時空ステイシスだ。無益な対決の可能性を排除する――それは私の時間の無駄でしかないからな。さあ――私の問いに集中しろ」
languages.original_text: "A rudimentary space-time stasis. It eliminates the possibility of a pointless confrontation, which would be a waste of my time. Now — focus on my question."

traits.locale_text: 「初歩的な時空ステイシスだ。無益な対決の可能性を排除する――それは私の時間の無駄でしかないからな。さあ――私の問いに集中しろ」
